allow: PowerShell(git reset -q; "unstaged all"; git add -A; "re-added"; git status --short | Select-Object -First 30; "..."; "Total staged files:"; \(git diff --cached --name-only | Measure-Object -Line\).Lines)
PowerShell(git commit -q -m "Initial commit: video synopsis app \(frontend + backend\)")

PowerShell("--- Node processes ---"; Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, ProcessName, StartTime; "--- Listening ports \(8000/3000/5500\) ---"; Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.LocalPort -in 8000,3000,5500,5000,8080 } | Select-Object LocalAddress, LocalPort, OwningProcess)

PowerShell(cd c:\\Bhavana\\video\\backend; node -e "require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); console.log\('PORT=', process.env.PORT\); console.log\('SUPABASE_URL set:', !!process.env.SUPABASE_URL\)"; "--- try starting server for 3s ---"; $p = Start-Process node -ArgumentList "server.js" -PassThru -NoNewWindow -RedirectStandardOutput out.log -RedirectStandardError err.log; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; if\(!$p.HasExited\){ "SERVER STILL RUNNING \(pid $\($p.Id\)\)"; Stop-Process -Id $p.Id -Force } else { "SERVER EXITED with code $\($p.ExitCode\)" }; "--- STDOUT ---"; Get-Content out.log -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "--- STDERR ---"; Get-Content err.log -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)

PowerShell(cd c:\\Bhavana\\video\\backend; $env:PORT=8000; Start-Process node -ArgumentList "server.js" -WindowStyle Hidden -RedirectStandardOutput srv-out.log -RedirectStandardError srv-err.log; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; "--- Is 8000 listening now? ---"; Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -LocalPort 8000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select LocalAddress,LocalPort,OwningProcess; "--- GET /api/health ---"; try { \(Invoke-WebRequest http://localhost:8000/api/health -UseBasicParsing\).Content } catch { "ERR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; "--- GET / \(root\) ---"; try { $r=Invoke-WebRequest http://localhost:8000/ -UseBasicParsing; "status $\($r.StatusCode\), len $\($r.Content.Length\)" } catch { "ERR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell("--- vercel.json exists? ---"; Test-Path c:\\Bhavana\\video\\vercel.json; "--- backend/routes ---"; Get-ChildItem c:\\Bhavana\\video\\backend\\routes -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select Name; "--- notes.js size ---"; \(Get-Item c:\\Bhavana\\video\\backend\\routes\\notes.js\).Length)

PowerShell(cd c:\\Bhavana\\video\\backend; Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -LocalPort 8000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Start-Sleep 1; Start-Process node -ArgumentList "server.js" -WindowStyle Hidden -RedirectStandardOutput srv-out.log -RedirectStandardError srv-err.log; Start-Sleep 2; "--- server stdout ---"; Get-Content srv-out.log -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "--- server stderr ---"; Get-Content srv-err.log -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "--- GET / ---"; try { $r=Invoke-WebRequest http://localhost:8000/ -UseBasicParsing; "200 len $\($r.Content.Length\)" } catch { "ERR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; "--- GET /api/health ---"; try { \(Invoke-WebRequest http://localhost:8000/api/health -UseBasicParsing\).Content } catch { "ERR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell($c = Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -LocalPort 8000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { "Server IS running on port 8000 \(pid $\($c.OwningProcess | Select-Object -First 1\)\)"; try { "health: " + \(Invoke-WebRequest http://localhost:8000/api/health -UseBasicParsing\).Content } catch { "health check failed" } } else { "Server is NOT running - you'll need to start it" })
Bash(node -e "require\('./backend/routes/notes.js'\); console.log\('notes.js loads OK, no syntax errors'\)")
